nasb.text: Let the groaning of the prisoner come before You; According to the greatness of Your power preserve those who are doomed to die.

esv.text: Let the groans of the prisoners come before you; according to your great power, preserve those doomed to die!

cnv.text: 願被囚的人的唉哼，達到你面前； 願你用你的大能，使那些已定死罪的人可以存留。

ccb.text: 求你垂听被囚之人的哀叹， 求你用大能的臂膀留住死囚的性命。

csbs.text: 愿被囚者的呻吟达到你面前—— 求你照着你膀臂的大能， 使那些注定要死的人存留。
